temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with a mustache, wearing a black leather jacket, looks up with a terrified expression. His eyes are wide with fear and his mouth is slightly open as he gasps for air. He is being choked from behind by an unseen person. (Storyline: The scene opens in the middle of a violent confrontation, immediately establishing a high-stakes, life-threatening situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of heavy, panicked breathing.)
(00:02-00:07) The camera angle shifts to show the man being choked from behind. He struggles to speak, his face contorted in pain and fear. He manages to gasp out a warning to the person in front of him. (Storyline: The victim, despite being in mortal danger, attempts to warn his companion about the impending arrival of police, escalating the tension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Strained, panicked, and urgent. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of choking and struggling.)
